headline: Northrop Grumman (NOC) Down 6.4% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Northrop Grumman (NOC) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Northrop Grumman to Participate in Bernstein’s 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference
summary: FALLS CHURCH, Va., May 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) will participate in Bernstein’s 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference on Thursday, May 28. Kathy Warden, chair, chief executive officer and president, will present beginning at 10:00 a.m. Eastern time. The presentation will be webcast live at http://investor.northropgrumman.com. Northrop Grumman is a leading global aerospace and defense technology company. Our pioneering solutions equip our customer

headline: Rocket Lab and AerSale Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after President Donald Trump said he called off what he described as a scheduled attack on Iran, citing "serious negotiations" underway toward a peace deal.

headline: One-Fifth of SpaceX Revenue Comes From Uncle Sam: The Defense Contractors That Should Worry
summary: SpaceX’s S-1 just handed legacy defense investors a number they cannot ignore. And you can bet they won’t. In 2025, roughly one-fifth of SpaceX revenue came from U.S. federal agencies, primarily NASA, the Department of War, the General Services Administration, and certain Intelligence Community agencies, focused on launch services, spacecraft development, satellite deployment, and artificial ... headline: Northrop Grumman’s Drone Push Reshapes Uncrewed And Radar Growth Story
summary: Northrop Grumman (NYSE:NOC) has been selected as one of five preferred payload providers for the Pentagon's multi billion dollar Drone Dominance Program, aimed at equipping more than 200,000 military drones. The company also reported progress on the YFQ-48A Talon Blue uncrewed aircraft collaboration, focused on next generation autonomous platforms. In parallel, Northrop Grumman announced the delivery of its 1,000th SABR radar system, a key step for digital manufacturing and fleet...
